Sustainability

Energy-Saving Equipment And Building Materials Used In The Warehouse Construction

Lighting for the Warehouse and the Office is LED which reduces the building's total energy consumption as well as reduces heat generation, moreover LED bulbs last longer than all other forms of lighting which leads to replacing warehouse lights less often and thereby cost saving.

Lighting for the Office controlled by sensors reduces energy consumption

Provided submeter for Air conditioning which can control AC usage and save energy.

Materials used for finishing are non-toxic paints, sealants, wood products, and adhesives which are sustainable products.

Structures insulation reduces energy use and comfortable working area for staff. We have provided an insulated sandwich panel roof sheet with 75mm PIR and a wall with 50mm PIR.

Provided skylight for the Warehouse which can bring lighting during day time reducing energy consumption

Water flow control mechanism using dual flush system and urinals for the workers and office facility to reduce water wastage.

External lighting is controlled by daylight dimmer system.

External infrastructure with interlock paving with SRI value >78 and Building envelope for the entire facility also complied with SRI value >78.
